title: rosa × odorata var. pseudindica
intro: Rosa × odorata var. pseudindica, also known as the Himalayan rose or Chinese pink, is a variety of fragrant rose that is native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × odorata var. pseudindica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Rosa × odorata var. pseudindica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
